full_text:
A) Dissociation

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H) by Foteini.

Dispase dissociation media included 19,4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17,8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) First RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. (1) Second RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min+ 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 5 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) First RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. (1) Second RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 7 mL of icPDC media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 5E6 cells/vial total 6 vials

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

C) Experiment

Cells were used for an ADC titration experiment using Datopotamab deruxtecan and its ADC control (human IgG1-deruxtecan, DAR4, five concentrations each) and Sacituzumab tirumotecan and its ADC control (human IgG1–sulfo-SPDB-DM4, five concentrations each).→See 15_Log_file_wet_lab on Google drive
